title: Minimum Weighted Subgraph With the Required Paths
titleCn: 包含要求路径的最小带权子图

testcases.input: n = 6, edges = [[0,2,2],[0,5,6],[1,0,3],[1,4,5],[2,1,1],[2,3,3],[2,3,4],[3,4,2],[4,5,1]], src1 = 0, src2 = 1, dest = 5 Output: 9 Explanation: The above figure represents the input graph. The blue edges represent one of the subgraphs that yield the optimal answer. Note that the subgraph [[1,0,3],[0,5,6]] also yields the optimal answer. It is not possible to get a subgraph with less weight satisfying all the constraints.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: The above figure represents the input graph. The blue edges represent one of the subgraphs that yield the optimal answer. Note that the subgraph [[1,0,3],[0,5,6]] also yields the optimal answer. It is not possible to get a subgraph with less weight satisfying all the constraints.

testcases.input: n = 3, edges = [[0,1,1],[2,1,1]], src1 = 0, src2 = 1, dest = 2 Output: -1 Explanation: The above figure represents the input graph. It can be seen that there does not exist any path from node 1 to node 2, hence there are no subgraphs satisfying all the constraints.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: The above figure represents the input graph. It can be seen that there does not exist any path from node 1 to node 2, hence there are no subgraphs satisfying all the constraints.
